published_prior_art.cite: Pearl1995CausalDiagrams: front-door functional identifies the ACE at the exclusion corner
Manski1990NonparametricBounds / ChernozhukovHongTamer2007ParameterSets: compact identified sets and endpoint reporting are standard partial-ID infrastructure

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_frontdoor_multi_mediator: related shared-latent non-rectangularity, but for multi-mediator PNDE/proxy geometry rather than a single clean mediator with bounded direct leak

published_prior_art.cite: Pearl1995CausalDiagrams gives only lambda=0; FulcherShpitserMarealleTchetgen2017GeneralizedFrontDoor targets PIIE; DingVanderWeele2016SharpMediationSensitivity and FrauenMelnychukFeuerriegel2023SharpBounds use different sensitivity classes

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_frontdoor_multi_mediator: asks for rational small-instance/non-rectangular witnesses, but not this leaky-front-door endpoint enumeration

published_prior_art.cite: BalkePearl1997Bounds and FinkelsteinAdamsSariaShpitser2020MeasurementError provide finite LP templates, not a bilinear shared-U active-cell rational endpoint construction

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_proximal_l2_bridge: nearby nonsmooth endpoint-inference concern, but for proximal L2 bridge endpoints rather than leaky front-door endpoints

published_prior_art.cite: FangSantos2019DirectionallyDifferentiable and ChernozhukovHongTamer2007ParameterSets supply inference machinery, but not this endpoint map or kink

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Theorem 2 / headline interval language
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Connectedness of I(lambda) is not proved; the settled conditional claim is sharp endpoint bounds [L(lambda),U(lambda)] unless OEQ4 also proves the full attainable set is an interval.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Stage 0 should derive compactness/nesting/endpoints, not silently upgrade to full-set interval connectedness.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Open-ended Question 4
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Finite active-branch and kink formula are open construction targets, scoped to the K<=5 finite latent-support convention and the stated no-kink convention.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Endpoint formula is conditional on constructing the active-cell rational representation rather than assumed as already available.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Open-ended Question 5
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Inference is conditional on the OEQ4 finite locally-C1 active-branch representation plus Assumption ass:inference-regularity.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Stage 0 should treat inference as a dependent construction question, not an independent proved estimator theorem.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: State explicitly in §8 or §11 whether [L(lambda),U(lambda)] is the sharp endpoint hull or the full attainable ACE set; add connectedness as a separate sub-question if the latter is intended.
For Conjecture 3, add one non-degenerate two-point-U numerical witness with active mediator shift and compute at least one candidate B_box value that violates the shared-U constraints.
Add MilesKankiMeloniTchetgen2015/2017 as a mediation partial-ID comparator in related work, even if only to distinguish natural-effect bounds from this total-effect front-door leak interval.
For OEQ4, make the Handle more operational by naming the exact finite variables and active-cell count in the |U|=2 starter case before general K<=5.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0 on the active-mediator-scoped field-tier kernel, with Stage 0 bound to the accepted endpoint-hull and OEQ dependency caveats.
